title: Lucid Worker Identity
description: Worker identity binds a physical/virtual compute node to a cryptographic identity for receipt signing. The execution_mode determines which fields must be present.

worker_id.description: Unique identifier for this worker instance. Format: 'worker-{type}-{name}-{index}' (e.g., 'worker-gpu-lucid-001')

provider_passport_id.description: Passport ID for the compute provider this worker belongs to

operator_pubkey.description: ed25519 public key (hex) for signing quotes and receipts

execution_mode.description: Execution mode this worker operates in. Determines attestation guarantees.

runtime_type.description: Type of runtime this worker uses for inference

runtime_hash.description: Docker image digest of the runtime container. MUST be null for managed_endpoint mode. Format: 'sha256:<digest>'

gpu_fingerprint.description: GPU hardware fingerprint. MUST be null for managed_endpoint mode. Format: '<vendor>-<model>-<vram>' (e.g., 'NVIDIA-A100-40GB')

gpu_count.description: Number of GPUs available on this worker. 0 for managed_endpoint mode.

capabilities.description: List of inference capabilities this worker supports

max_batch_size.description: Maximum batch size supported for concurrent inference

supported_models.description: List of model IDs this worker can serve (empty = any compatible model)

status.description: Current operational status of the worker

last_heartbeat.description: Unix timestamp of last heartbeat received

registered_at.description: Unix timestamp when this worker was first registered

metadata.description: Additional worker metadata (e.g., operator contact, pricing info)
